name: Underpowered guard (n_mut < 15 → PromotionBlockedError)
how_it_solves: If the reference cohort for a promotion decision has n < 15, apply_rs_promotion raises PromotionBlockedError instead of promoting.
why_it_exists: Stops the fuser from claiming 'STRONG (rs_promotion)' when the underlying cohort is statistically underpowered.
